class.name: PlayFabPartyPeer
class.brief_description: Godot multiplayer peer for a PlayFab Party network.
class.description: Assigned to [code]multiplayer.multiplayer_peer[/code] for RPC and gameplay traffic. Hosts use Godot peer id [code]1[/code] and clients receive positive ids through the addon's transport handshake. Reserved handshake/control packets are filtered out of the public packet queue. Text chat, transcription, mute, and permissions are exposed through peer-id helpers on this class. They use Party chat-control APIs internally and never travel through Godot RPC packets.

method.name: get_local_user
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabUser] for this peer.

method.name: get_descriptor
method.description: Returns the finalized base64 network descriptor, or an empty string while the descriptor is still pending.

method.name: get_peer_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key dictionary for [param peer_id].

method.name: get_peers
method.description: Returns the list of known peer ids.

method.name: get_local_chat_control
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabPartyChatControl], if chat is enabled.

method.name: get_peer_chat_control
method.description: Returns the remote [PlayFabPartyChatControl] for [param peer_id], if known.

method.name: send_text_async
method.description: Sends [param message] through the local Party chat control. An empty [param target_peer_ids] sends to all known remote chat controls; unknown ids return a failed [PlayFabResult].

method.name: set_peer_chat_permissions_async
method.description: Updates the local chat-control relationship permissions for [param peer_id]. See [enum PlayFabParty.ChatPermission].

method.name: set_peer_muted_async
method.description: Mutes or unmutes [param peer_id] on the local chat control.

method.name: close_with_reason
method.description: Closes internal routing and network resources, emitting Godot-consistent connection state transitions.

signal.name: connection_state_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the peer's [enum MultiplayerPeer.ConnectionStatus] changes.

signal.name: network_error
signal.description: Emitted when a Party transport error occurs.

signal.name: chat_control_added
signal.description: Emitted when a chat control is added for [param peer_id].

signal.name: chat_control_removed
signal.description: Emitted when a chat control is removed for [param peer_id].

signal.name: text_message_received
signal.description: Emitted when a text chat message is received from [param peer_id].

signal.name: transcription_received
signal.description: Emitted when a speech-to-text transcription is received from [param peer_id].

signal.name: chat_permissions_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the local chat-control relationship permissions for [param peer_id] change.

signal.name: peer_muted_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the mute state of [param peer_id] on the local chat control changes.
